title: Accessibility and Adobe Experience Manager UX — Erste Bank, Vienna
summary: Enterprise accessibility guidance and Adobe Experience Manager experience work for Erste Bank in Vienna.
claims: Joz worked on accessibility guidance and AEM-related experience work for Erste Bank in Vienna.
The work sat inside a regulated banking context where usability, governance, and risk reduction mattered.
proof_points: Erste Bank already exists in the proof layer as engineering and accessibility work at 16M+ customer scale.
This record narrows retrieval to the accessibility and AEM programme rather than the broader hero proof.
source_notes: Grouped programme record. 16M+ scale may be referenced only through the existing Erste proof object.
